text_block_list.text:
While Special Week is out running, I spend some time thinking about
what to do next.

She's lost sight of her dream to become the number one racer in all of
Japan. What should I do as her trainer to get her back on the right
track?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Oh, Trainer?! Were you waiting for me this whole time?! But it's already so late...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Go out? Where to?
choice_data_list: The place of your hopes and dreams!
The place of your hopes and dreams!

text_block_list.text: (Yeahhhh!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In first place is Silence Suzuka! She's so fast that the other contestants
can't even keep up with her shadow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's amazing! Like super-duper amazing! Are you seeing this?! Look
at Suzuka go! My eyes can't get enough of her running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And listen to the crowd roar! Hehe, they're making my ears ring!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This is incredible! The Twinkle Series really is somethin' else!
choice_data_list:
Since when did you want to run in the Twinkle
Series?

Since when did you want to run in the Twinkle
Series?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uh... good question. I'm not sure, actually. I've always wanted to run
in the Twinkle Series, so it's hard for me pinpoint an exact time...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, I think I remember!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Back when I was just four years old, my mom and I were out for a
drive, and we saw this old lady who looked like she was really
struggling.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think she might have had an illness, and it was flaring up. We
wanted to call a hospital, but there weren't any phones nearby.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I just ran to the nearest clinic as fast as my legs would allow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The doctor did everything to help the old lady, and she got better
without any major problems.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
At first, my mom got mad at me for running off all alone, but after
that, she gave me a biiig hug.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She told me she was proud of me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah. She said, "You're my—our pride." She also said that she's so happy to see that I'm growing up to be healthy and dependable.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right... That's when I realized that I wanted to run even faster and
become an even better person!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I only had one thing in mind: to become the best version of myself.
That's why...

Right then, I see the twinkle in her eyes that I had seen when we first
met, and her hopes and dreams come alive once more.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, today's final race! The last show on the greatest of stages,
the Twinkle Series! Who will seize victory and take home the event's
crown?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can I ask you a favor? I want to have another go at partner
racing with El and Grass.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Please!
The following day...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Is that all you got, Spe?! Then I guess I'll be taking first place!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (My body is still freezing up...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I still get scared whenever I think of what happened then... All I want
is to get along with everybody and have fun!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I don't want my friends to not like me!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (But still...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Spe! Hehe, now that's what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But the race isn't over just yet!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(That's right... If I want to win, I have to run! Run fast! Run hard! That's
why I'm here in the first place!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I know we're friends, and I want my friends to like me! But... if I want to become a person that makes people proud, I need to... No, I will run!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

All three girls give it everything they've got, locked in a tight race
until the finish.

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gracias, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Gra...tin? What?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It means "thank you"! Spe, thanks for giving it your all. Because of
that, I was able to give it my best too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When we compete against each other with everything we've got, it
allows us to take our running further! It allows us to grow! So muchas
gracias, Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's make sure to give it our all when we compete—as friends and as rivals! Let's keep honing our skills and polishing our abilities!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El! ...Yeah, yeah! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hey, Spe! That girl over there... She's been watching you for a
while now. I think she has something to say to you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who? Oh!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm sorry, Spe. I don't know what got into me...

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I was in bad shape, so I panicked and took out my anger on you... I
shouldn't have been so mean! I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about it. Water under the bridge! So don't cry, okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But instead, promise me that next time we race, we do it fair and
square! If you win, you can make your debut! I'm not going to hold
back, though!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Spe... Okay! I'm gonna train lots and lots so I can beat you at
your best!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Heheh... I can't wait! Let's both give it our all—as rivals and as friends!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer, thanks for everything. You reminded me of why I run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
As long as I have you and my friends, I'm sure I'll be able to keep on
running. One day, I'll reach my goal of becoming Japan's number one
racer!
(Gurgle...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, my! Spe... Is that what I think it is?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bwahahahaha! Talk about perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not you too! This is so embarrassing...
